title: After the Queen Elizabeth II Cup: The Way of Magic

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And Sweep Tosho comes in first! The sheer power
in that performance was absolutely overwhelming!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh. I lost.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'm so saaaad!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: And I was really going for the win! Sniffle... Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: Pffft. Hahaha.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: Then let's just race again... and again and again!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Because as long as we keep challenging each
other—as long as we keep moving forward—our
path will never end!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Heh... That sounds good to me.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That way, we can fill the world with even more
excitement!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And then, the excitement will keep building and
building—all the way into the future!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...I kinda like that.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Me too...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I've made up my mind. Let's go home,
Vodka!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Already? They haven't even done any
interviews yet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I don't need to see those. If the people who came
before us are forging a future, we have to get
serious! We'll forge the future beyond theirs!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Because I'm going to be the ultimate number one!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Haha! Geez, you're such a handful...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, wait up! I'm gonna pave my own path before
you do!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
No way I'm just gonna sit around while everyone
else hits the big time!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. Everyone's got so much energy! ♪ Well,
guess it's time for me to scoot too.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm not trying to cast any magic, though—I'm
gonna make some miracles happen.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Sweep! Which race are you running in next?! I'm
going to run too, so hurry up and tell me!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. Please! Be! Quiet! Just gimme a chance to
rest!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: What?! I couldn't possibly! I'm ready now! The spirit of vengeance burns within me at this very moment!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, Kawakami! You're acting just as spoiled as
Sweep.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Seriously?! You too, Familiar?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the little witch continues happily along
the path she and her apprentices are forging.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel sure that she'll cast some new magic on the
world someday. And when she does, it'll be
alongside a new generation of Umamusume.
